items.d: It is a big bird with big eyes. At night it is not in bed.
items.s: An ___ can fly at night and has big eyes.
items.hintDe: Ein großer Vogel mit großen Augen, der in der Nacht wach ist.

items.d: It is a small bird in a cage. It can talk.
items.s: The ___ in its cage can talk.
items.hintDe: Ein kleiner, bunter Vogel im Käfig, der sprechen kann.

items.d: It is very big and grey with big ears and a very long nose.
items.s: The ___ at the zoo is grey with big ears and a long nose.
items.hintDe: Sehr groß und grau, mit großen Ohren und einer langen Nase.

items.d: It is very small and it has eight legs.
items.s: There is a big ___ with eight legs on the wall.
items.hintDe: Sehr klein und hat acht Beine.

items.d: It flies at night and it sleeps in the day.
items.s: A ___ sleeps in the day and flies at night.
items.hintDe: Sie fliegt in der Nacht und schläft am Tag.

items.d: It is a big grey fish in the sea with sharp teeth.
items.s: Mr White's ___ is big and eats fish in its tank.
items.hintDe: Ein großer grauer Fisch im Meer mit scharfen Zähnen.

items.d: It looks like a horse with black and white stripes.
items.s: The ___ looks like a horse and lives at the zoo.
items.hintDe: Sieht aus wie ein Pferd, hat schwarze und weiße Streifen.

items.d: It is big with a long neck and lives where it is hot.
items.s: The big ___ at the zoo can go a long time with no milk or food.
items.hintDe: Groß, mit langem Hals; lebt dort, wo es sehr heiß ist.

items.d: It is a small horse for children.
items.s: The small ___ at the farm is a little horse for children.
items.hintDe: Ein kleines Pferd für Kinder.

items.d: It is small with no long ears and eats carrots in its cage.
items.s: My ___ is small and eats carrots in its cage.
items.hintDe: Klein, ohne lange Ohren; frisst Karotten im Käfig.

items.d: It can swim and you can keep it in a tank.
items.s: My pet ___ swim in a big tank with water.
items.hintDe: Es schwimmt; du hältst es in einem Aquarium.

items.d: It is a small farm one. It is pink and likes mud.
items.s: The ___ on the farm likes to play in the mud.
items.hintDe: Ein kleines Bauernhoftier; rosa und mag Schlamm.

items.d: It is small with very long ears and can run and jump.
items.s: My ___ has soft fur and long ears.
items.hintDe: Klein, mit sehr langen Ohren; kann laufen und springen.

items.d: It is small and green and lives in a terrarium.
items.s: The ___ lives in a terrarium with rocks and a long tail.
items.hintDe: Klein und grün; lebt in einem Terrarium.

items.d: It looks like a big mouse and has a long tail.
items.s: The ___ is grey and looks like a big mouse.
items.hintDe: Sieht aus wie eine große Maus und hat einen langen Schwanz.

items.d: It is very small and grey and a cat runs after it.
items.s: A little grey ___ has big ears and a long tail.
items.hintDe: Sehr klein und grau; eine Katze läuft ihr nach.

items.d: It is slow and has a hard shell on its back.
items.s: My ___ is very slow and has a shell on its back.
items.hintDe: Langsam; hat einen harten Panzer auf dem Rücken.

items.d: You put your school things in this. It is made of paper.
items.s: The spider lives in a ___ and you feed it once a week.
items.hintDe: Du legst Dinge hinein; sie kann aus Papier sein.

items.d: You keep fish in this. It is glass and has water in it.
items.s: My pet fish swim in a big glass ___ with water.
items.hintDe: Darin hältst du Fische; es ist aus Glas und voll Wasser.

items.d: A bird lives in this. It has thin bars.
items.s: The budgie lives in its ___ all day.
items.hintDe: Darin lebt ein Vogel; er hat dünne Gitterstäbe.

items.d: You keep a lizard or a small snake in this glass box.
items.s: The lizard lives in a glass ___ with rocks.
items.hintDe: Darin hältst du eine Eidechse oder kleine Schlange; eine Glasbox.

items.d: It is not like other things. It is not normal.
items.s: A snake is a very ___ pet.
items.hintDe: Nicht wie andere Dinge; nicht normal.

items.d: It is very small and grey.
items.s: I have one ___ and my friend has four mice.
items.hintDe: Sehr klein und grau; viele davon heißen "mice".

items.d: It shows how often, like two times in the morning and the evening.
items.s: She gives her dog food three times ___ day.
items.hintDe: Sagt, wie oft an einem Tag, zum Beispiel zweimal am Tag.
items.note: Two-form phrase '... a day'; blank takes 'a' after 'three times'.

items.d: It is one time.
items.s: He gives his dog food ___ a day, in the morning.
items.hintDe: Ein Mal.

items.d: It is two times in one day.
items.s: I give my spider food ___ a week.
items.hintDe: Zwei Mal.

items.d: It is in all of a big country.
items.s: There are many dogs ___ Britain.
items.hintDe: Bedeutet: überall in einem großen Land.
items.note: MC keeps 3 distinct in-bank words; 'across' removed from mc as it is the headword.

items.d: It is not safe and it can hurt you.
items.s: Snakes can hurt you. They are ___.
items.hintDe: Nicht sicher; es kann dir wehtun.

items.d: Horses, pigs and cows live here in the woods.
items.s: She lives on a ___ with horses and pigs.
items.hintDe: Ein Zuhause für Pferde, Schweine und Kühe.

items.d: It is a boy when he is big. He is not a girl or a woman.
items.s: The ___ near Chester has a camel at his farm.
items.hintDe: Ein Bub, wenn er groß ist; kein Mädchen und keine Frau.

items.d: It is close to a place. It is not far.
items.s: The Smith family lives ___ London.
items.hintDe: Nahe bei einem Ort; nicht weit weg.

items.d: You read it for the news. It is not a book.
items.s: Mum reads the ___ in the morning.
items.hintDe: Du liest sie für die Nachrichten; kein Buch.

items.d: It shows how often, like one time from Monday to Sunday.
items.s: I give my spider food once ___ week.
items.hintDe: Sagt, wie oft in einer Woche, zum Beispiel einmal in der Woche.
items.note: Two-form phrase '... a week'; blank takes 'a' after 'once'.

items.d: It is a thing you put food or things in to carry them.
items.s: She has two ___ for the food.
items.hintDe: Ein Ding, in das du Essen oder Sachen zum Tragen legst.
items.note: Blank is plural 'baskets' (after 'two'); singular 'basket' is the headword/dAnswer.

items.d: It is a girl child in a family.
items.s: Clare is her ___. She is a girl.
items.hintDe: Das Mädchen-Kind in einer Familie.

items.d: You do this when you go in a car to a city.
items.s: On Sunday they ___ to Grandpa in the car.
items.hintDe: Das machst du, wenn du mit dem Auto in eine Stadt fährst.

items.d: It is all the children in the class, not one child.
items.s: There is no Archie, and ___ is very sad.
items.hintDe: Alle Kinder in der Klasse, nicht nur eines.

items.d: It is not near here. It is a long way from here.
items.s: Grandpa lives ___, so we go in the car.
items.hintDe: Nicht in der Nähe; ein langer Weg von hier.

items.d: He is the old man in your family. He is your mum's father.
items.s: My ___ lives on a farm with horses.
items.hintDe: Der alte Mann in deiner Familie; der Vater deiner Mama.

items.d: It is the woman in your family. You are her child.
items.s: Clare and her ___ drive away in the car.
items.hintDe: Die Frau in deiner Familie; du bist ihr Kind.

items.d: It is a loud sound that is not nice to hear.
items.s: Clare can hear a ___ in the room. What is that?
items.hintDe: Ein lautes Geräusch, das nicht schön zu hören ist.

items.d: To not leave. To be here and not go.
items.s: We can't ___ here, we must go now.
items.hintDe: Nicht weggehen; hier sein und nicht gehen.

items.d: It is a soft thing like a bear that a child takes to bed.
items.s: He plays all day with his soft ___.
items.hintDe: Ein weiches Spielzeug, das ein Kind ins Bett mitnimmt.

items.d: You go to your grandpa and stay with him for a day.
items.s: On Sunday they ___ Grandpa and have tea.
items.hintDe: Du gehst zu deinem Opa und bleibst einen Tag bei ihm.

items.d: You like a thing and you want to know more about it.
items.s: I am ___ in dogs and books.
items.hintDe: Du magst etwas und willst mehr darüber wissen.

items.d: It is the soft hair on a cat or a dog.
items.s: My rabbit has ___ on its body, lots of it.
items.hintDe: Das weiche Haar auf einer Katze oder einem Hund.

items.d: It is about you. It is not for other people to see.
items.s: Where you live is your ___ thing, for you and your family.
items.hintDe: Es geht um dich; nicht für andere Leute zum Sehen.

items.d: It is the man or woman who has the dog.
items.s: Jamie is the ___ of an unusual pet.
items.hintDe: Der Mann oder die Frau, der/dem der Hund gehört.

items.d: She is the sister of your mum or the sister of the man in your family.
items.s: My ___ Jane is my mum's sister.
items.hintDe: Die Schwester deiner Mama oder die Schwester des Mannes in deiner Familie.

items.d: It is a nice word like Hello at the start of a letter.
items.s: ___ Aunty Olivia, thank you for your letter.
items.hintDe: Ein nettes Wort wie "Hallo" am Anfang eines Briefes.

items.d: You write it and send it to a friend.
items.s: Thank you for your ___, Harry.
items.hintDe: Du schreibst ihn und schickst ihn einem Freund.

items.d: A dog does this with its teeth when it is angry.
items.s: That dog is angry. It can ___ you with its teeth!
items.hintDe: Das macht ein Hund mit seinen Zähnen, wenn er böse ist.

items.d: It is the first part of a book or film.
items.s: The ___ of the book is very good.
items.hintDe: Der erste Teil eines Buches oder Films.

items.d: To start to do a thing.
items.s: He always ___ his letter with Hi.
items.hintDe: Anfangen, etwas zu tun.
items.note: Blank takes 3rd-person 'begins'; citation 'begin'/'to begin' are dAnswers.

items.d: You write these at the end of a letter to a friend.
items.s: I end my letter like this: Best ___, Tom.
items.hintDe: Das schreibst du am Ende eines Briefes an einen Freund.

items.d: It is the last part of a book or film.
items.s: The ___ of the film is very sad.
items.hintDe: Der letzte Teil eines Buches oder Films.

items.d: When you must have a thing, you do this.
items.s: I ___ more food for my rabbit. It is hungry.
items.hintDe: Wenn du etwas haben musst, dann machst du das.
